creator: mindaugas.liubinas@gmail.com
text:
Here's output:

[root@server ~]# id
uid=0(root) gid=0(wheel) groups=0(wheel), 5(operator)
[root@server ~]# pkg_add -r sudo
Fetching ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-6-stable/Latest/sudo.tbz... Done.
[root@server ~]# visudo
/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: visudo: Undefined symbol "__sbmaskrune"

I've tried to reinstall sudo, but 'visudo' command fails the same...
